services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: At First Real State we don't just sell properties, we accompany you throughout the process with specialized services that guarantee your peace of mind and success.
services.whatItMeans: What does this mean for you?

items.title: Personalized Accompaniment
items.desc: A First Real State expert guides you every step of the way, from the search to the signing.

items.title: Legal Certainty (Shielding)
items.desc: We review legal documentation, encumbrances, and permits in detail. We operate with exhaustive international standard "Due Diligence".
items.benefit: Maximum Legal Security. You avoid frauds and future problems.

items.title: Efficient Notary Management
items.desc: We coordinate and prepare all documents for signing before a Notary, ensuring a fast and smooth process.

items.title: Basic Tax Advice
items.desc: We guide you on the taxes and deed expenses associated with your purchase or sale operation.
items.benefit: Clarity in your Costs. You know exactly what you will pay.

items.title: Representation and Management
items.desc: If you cannot be present, we can legally represent you to advance the paperwork with a power of attorney.

cta.title: Ready to experience our services?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and discover how we can make your real estate experience exceptional.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: At First Real State, we understand that finding the perfect place to call home is a crucial step in every person's life.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Our mission is to provide our clients with personalized, high-quality service focused on the protection and ethical management of their assets in a professional and transparent manner.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide each of our actions and decisions
values.val1Desc: Our staff is trained to act professionally, loyally, and ethically in all interactions, ensuring transparency in every transaction.
values.val2Desc: We encourage active collaboration among all team members, working together to achieve a common goal that translates into an improved experience for our clients.
values.val3Desc: Our clients' satisfaction is our highest priority in every real estate process. The trust they place in us is our greatest achievement.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.subtitle: Transforming the real estate landscape in Mexico
